name: Jonathan McConnell
subject: You won't believe this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend --
You’ll never believe what just happened. Just as we were ready to start tonight's debate, Richard Shelby sent in one of his cronies to shut it down. It's bad enough that he didn’t have the courage to face me in the first place, but it’s an insult to democracy that he and his cronies decided to suppress free speech that I, and many others, fought to defend as a Marine. Every Alabamian should be as furious as I am that Senator Shelby believes this election can be stolen and he will continue to get rich off of the taxpayers’ dime. He exemplifies everything that is wrong with politicians — we must put an end to it. Jonathan
Sent from my iPhone

name: Rand Paul
subject: Let me tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

When I heard the news on Saturday that
Justice Scalia had passed away, my heart went out to his family,
friends, and to our country. Justice Scalia was a great defender
of the constitution and an incredibly important conservative
voice in the court.

There is no doubt his voice of reason will be
missed on the bench.

And the vacancy will be felt in more ways
than one.

You see, President Obama and the Democrats
have wasted no time making this vacancy a huge political
statement, and they are calling for an immediate replacement in
the court - of course a liberal one that could tilt the balance
of the court for years.

President Obama thinks this is his chance to
put an end to originalist interpretation of the Constitution. His
last chance, in his last few months office.

I am not going to let him do it. There's too
much at stake.

Will you join with me today in standing up to
President Obama and the liberals in the Senate?

If you don't, it is clear what will happen.

President Obama will nominate a replacement
-- a liberal replacement -- and liberals in the Senate will force
the idea that it's the job in the Senate to confirm whoever the
President recommends.

This could change the entire path of our
country with just a few short months until our next President
takes office.

I cannot stress this enough: the Senate
should not confirm a Supreme Court nomination from President
Obama.

The fact of the matter is, it's been standard
practice over the last nearly 80 years that Supreme Court
nominees are not nominated and confirmed during a presidential
election year.

In fact, Democrats in the Senate held to that
standard during Republican Presidencies.

Now of course they are singing a different
tune.

I plan to lead the fight to stop them in the
Senate.

Patriot, will you stand with me as I do
everything I can to block President Obama's attempt to silence
the opinion of the American public?

The passing of Justice Scalia has made it
more clear than ever that the role of the Senate is vital to
maintaining liberty.

Without a strong Senate, we cannot ensure
that our court is upholding the Constitution.

That's why I am committed to another term for
Kentucky and for this country.

Please stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

amount >>

name: Ruth Sherlock
subject: Peter, time is almost up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
|
---

Peter, this is it.

At 7pm ET tomorrow, the clock above will hit zero and the polls will close in South Carolina.

**I'll cut right to the chase -- every single donation we receive between now and then will help to decide where Dr. Carson finishes. If there ever were a time to donate, it's now.**

[**Will you help by making a donation of just $2?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33653768:sBYEjyCNc:m:1:876315805:7808A11B8440B8D7A86E27D2FA125898:r)

Four years ago during the 2012 Republican Presidential Primary in South Carolina, the race moved by nearly 30 points in one week. Roughly 20 percent of voters were still undecided by the time they walked into the voting booth. This year, not only are there still tons of undecided voters, but there is still a large percentage of voters who could change their minds.

**This race is fluid and anything can happen. That's why we're looking to you.**

While we've built an incredible team across the state, we still need people like you that aren't here in South Carolina to ensure that we have the resources to reach every targeted voter.

[**From our TV ads to our online targeting to our phone calling and door knocking, each of these efforts can be bolstered by your urgent donation of $2 now. Time is almost up.
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33653768:sBYEjyCNc:m:1:876315805:7808A11B8440B8D7A86E27D2FA125898:r)
Thank you for your help.

Sincerely,

Ruth Sherlock
South Carolina State Director

Friend,

Peter, I can't say it any better than Ruth did below. Every donation we receive before 7pm ET tomorrow will help us reach more voters in South Carolina. We need all hands on deck.

[Please help by donating just $2 right now](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33664089:WSy5HyCNF:m:1:876315805:E01A95B37B20C9F1B988D1B7A52BCD75:r). We'd sincerely appreciate it.

\- Ben

Sent from my iPhone

\-------Begin forwarded message-------

From: Ruth Sherlock
Subject: Ben, time is almost up
Date: February 19, 2016
To: Ben Carson

|
---

Peter, this is it.

At 7pm ET tomorrow, the clock above will hit zero and the polls will close in South Carolina.

**I'll cut right to the chase -- every single donation we receive between now and then will help to decide where Dr. Carson finishes. If there ever were a time to donate, it's now.**

[**Will you help by making a donation of just $2?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33664089:WSy5HyCNF:m:1:876315805:E01A95B37B20C9F1B988D1B7A52BCD75:r)

Four years ago during the 2012 Republican Presidential Primary in South Carolina, the race moved by nearly 30 points in one week. Roughly 20 percent of voters were still undecided by the time they walked into the voting booth. This year, not only are there still tons of undecided voters, but there is still a large percentage of voters who could change their minds.

**This race is fluid and anything can happen. That's why we're looking to you.**

While we've built an incredible team across the state, we still need people like you that aren't here in South Carolina to ensure that we have the resources to reach every targeted voter.

[**From our TV ads to our online targeting to our phone calling and door knocking, each of these efforts can be bolstered by your urgent donation of $2 now. Time is almost up.
**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33664089:WSy5HyCNF:m:1:876315805:E01A95B37B20C9F1B988D1B7A52BCD75:r)
Thank you for your help.

Sincerely,

Ruth Sherlock
South Carolina State Director

name: Jonathan McConnell
subject: Shelby chickened out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jonathan McConnell
body:
| Friend -- For the last four weeks, we’ve been calling on Richard Shelby to come out of the woodwork and debate. Last night, he had that chance, but he decided it would be easier to have his cronies cancel the debate altogether. Why? Because the host — a self-proclaimed Shelby supporter — wanted to suppress any mention of Shelby’s 37 pork-filled years in DC and the dirty campaign he’s running. It would have been insulting enough to Alabamians if Shelby simply hadn’t shown up, but it’s an affront to democracy for him to quash any forum where his opponents would hold him accountable. Let’s make this the last time he insults the people of Alabama — we’re approaching the finish line and need all the help we can get to bring true leadership and accountability to the Senate. [Will you chip in so we can force Richard Shelby into retirement?](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fmcconnell-for-senate-shelby-chickened-out%3Fsc%3D20160219-f&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160219_f&n=1) [ **Chip in, Friend** ](http://www.mcconnell2016.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fmcconnell-for-senate-shelby-chickened-out%3Fsc%3D20160219-f&e=92249b206344e4c5e978546dc4ae2bbd&utm_source=mcconnell&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160219_f&n=2) Let’s beat back the Establishment and shake up Washington! name: BernieSanders.com
subject: They're talking about YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
This campaign has been so successful because it's powered by working people. The financial and political elite of this country aren't driving our effort and they certainly aren't calling the shots.
That has our opponents panicked, and on the eve of the Nevada caucus they have taken to lashing out. Not just at Bernie, but at you.
* Bill Clinton compared supporters powering our political revolution - people like you - to the Tea Party. The Tea Party!

* A Clinton superdelegate expressed outrage that people who might be voting for the first time would dare challenge the selection of the Democratic Party's elite.

* One of the pro-Clinton super PACs has now dumped over $1 million into the Democratic primary process -- even though they said their Wall Street and big donor cash was only to be used against the Republicans.

That's fine. While they are throwing stones, we're going to keep our eyes on the prize: winning the Democratic primary, the White House, and taking our country back from the billionaire class. **And next up is Nevada, where a recent poll shows we trail by JUST ONE POINT.**
[**Your $3 contribution to Bernie 's campaign, right now, could mean the difference between victory and defeat in Nevada, and for our political revolution in the Democratic primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160219gm-nd-3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160219gm-nd-3")
Through our campaign, we have brought millions of new people into the political process, and that is something we're very proud of -- everyone should be. It's good for Democrats, and it's good for democracy.
Combating political alienation, cynicism, and legitimate anger in this country will not be easy. But if we are to reinvigorate American democracy, if the American middle class is going to stand up and fight back, this is the struggle that we must undertake together.
That is what we are doing on this campaign, and Nevada is the next step. That is why your contribution is so important. Make it today:
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/lets_win_nevada**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160219gm-nd-3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160219gm-nd-3")
Nobody can defeat the billionaire class by himself or herself. We can only do it together and united.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160219gm-nd-3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nevada-poll?refcode=em160219gm-nd-3")**
